privileged_info_summary: The task 'process_credit_hold_customer@1' operates on synthetic data created during task setup via Odoo XML-RPC API calls. All metadata values are verified: customer_name 'Gemini Furniture', opportunity_name 'Gemini - Office Chairs', tag_name 'Credit Hold', and lost_reason_name 'Credit Issues'. These values are consistently referenced across setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and task.json. The task works with real Odoo CRM models (crm.lost.reason, res.partner.category, crm.lead, res.partner) and features (lost reasons, tags, opportunities) that are documented in official Odoo CRM documentation.
